payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Rectangular beige/cream pillow with thin blue-gray horizontal stripes on a woven fabric surface, slightly wrinkled and horizontally oriented in a tight crop; appears to be a standard bed pillow photographed close up (approx. 0.6 m from camera).
